title: Initial Launcher Build
changes: Casual / Deck Game panel placeholder added.
Image-based mode cards implemented with hover zoom effects.
Active user profile card added to Mode Select.
Launcher footer added with version display and patch notes access.
Patch Notes modal system introduced with JSON-driven rendering.

title: User & Mode Systems
changes: UserContext system added for managing user state.
Role badge system implemented (Admin+, Admin, Duelist, Applicant).
Mode access logic implemented for progression states.
Progression access states added (accepted, pending, restricted).

title: Navigation & Layout Framework
changes: LauncherLayout system created for shared background, overlay, and footer.

title: Project Initialization
changes: Project Onyx web application framework created.
